nasb.text: Though the fig tree should not blossom And there be no fruit on the vines, Though the yield of the olive should fail And the fields produce no food, Though the flock should be cut off from the fold And there be no cattle in the stalls,

esv.text: Though the fig tree should not blossom, nor fruit be on the vines, the produce of the olive fail and the fields yield no food, the flock be cut off from the fold and there be no herd in the stalls,

cnv.text: 無花果樹縱不發芽，葡萄樹不結果， 橄欖樹無所出，田裡無收成， 圈內的羊被剪除，棚裡也沒有牛，

ccb.text: 即使无花果树不发芽， 葡萄树不结果， 橄榄树无收成， 田地不产粮， 圈里没有羊， 棚里没有牛，
